ordered_events.detail: emerges from tree line, crosses harvested steppe unhurried
ordered_events.quote: A HORSEMAN emerges from the tree line

objects.detail: single upright thistle at cart-track verge; trembles but does not fall

ordered_events.detail: descends toward Mahket aoul at dusk, watching the rooftops
ordered_events.quote: holds his horse to a walk on the descent

ordered_events.detail: arrives at Sado's saklya in Mahket at night, wakes Sado
ordered_events.quote: stops at a saklya cut into the hillside

ordered_events.detail: takes Hadji Murad's rifle and sword, hangs them with the house weapons
ordered_events.quote: lifts Hadji Murad's rifle and sword

ordered_events.detail: brought in by Sado's son to be introduced to Hadji Murad
ordered_events.quote: the boy returns with BATA

objects.detail: hung beside the house weapons, handled with reverence
set along the front wall for the men
pinches, rolls grains to silently set the guide's price
hand rests on the hilt throughout the bargaining

ordered_events.detail: takes custody of Hadji Murad's note to relay it to his son Yusuf
ordered_events.quote: Sado's hand closes over the note

objects.detail: pours cold water over Hadji Murad's hands
dries hands after washing
drawn from beneath a cartridge-bullet, addressed to his son Yusuf
custody passes to Sado to send onward to Yusuf
note was concealed beneath it
flat of blade used to press honey onto bread crust

ordered_events.detail: emerges from the treeline with hands raised, presents himself to the Russian patrol
ordered_events.quote: both empty hands raised wide

ordered_events.detail: taller murid accompanies Bata, mirrors his raised-hands gesture
ordered_events.quote: a taller murid mirroring him

ordered_events.detail: delivers a folded letter to Panov meant for the Russian command
ordered_events.quote: extending a folded letter between two worlds

ordered_events.detail: marched with the murid by Avdeev and Bondarenko toward the fort as emissaries
ordered_events.quote: march the pair toward the fort's distant lights

objects.detail: packs and lights tobacco during the night watch
Bata's letter, taken by Panov to send up the chain
drops rifle butt to the ground while crouching by the fire

counts.what: Russian soldiers at the ambush post

ordered_events.detail: summoned out of the drawing room by a servant
ordered_events.quote: is summoned out by a servant

ordered_events.detail: returns to the drawing room composed, calls for champagne
ordered_events.quote: returns composed, calls for champagne

objects.detail: four candles lit on the card table, last one pinched out
called for upon his return to the room

counts.quote: Four candles burn on a card table

objects.detail: hand finds it instinctively upon waking
kept in his belt while he sleeps in the corner

ordered_events.detail: five armed men block the lane, order Hadji Murad to halt
ordered_events.quote: shadows peel from a wall — five men, muskets rising

ordered_events.detail: spurs through the ambushers with Eldar, breaking their line, rides free of Mahket
ordered_events.quote: spurs straight into them; the line breaks apart against the wall

objects.detail: carried across his thigh while riding
drawn from belt to charge through the ambushers
raised to halt Hadji Murad; ambush fails

counts.quote: A boy holds two steaming horses

ordered_events.detail: twenty riders from the aoul close the gap and fan out behind Hadji Murad
ordered_events.quote: twenty mounted men close the gap and fan out behind him

ordered_events.detail: hold their distance through the standoff, then fall back and disappear
ordered_events.quote: The hooves behind him thin, fall back, and are gone.

objects.detail: half-drawn from its cover during the standoff, then re-covered
unbuttoned then rebuttoned during the standoff
dropped, then taken up again as he resumes riding
half out of its cover as the pursuers close

counts.quote: twenty mounted men close the gap

ordered_events.detail: arrives at the forest glade; the murids scatter and stamp out the bonfire coals
ordered_events.quote: at Hadji Murad's arrival the coals are scattered with boot heels

ordered_events.detail: rides in at first light with word the Russian prince will see Hadji Murad tomorrow
ordered_events.quote: rides in at first light

objects.detail: lifted, carried to the forest edge as lookout
pours water over his hands before prayer
spread on the ground for prayer, earth shaken from it afterward
removed before prayer

ordered_events.detail: rides into the forest-road clearing at the head of his party to meet the Russians
ordered_events.quote: rides into the clearing at the head of a small mounted party

ordered_events.detail: rides out for a brief inconclusive skirmish with Chechen horsemen across the ravine
ordered_events.quote: rides out into a thin, inconclusive exchange

ordered_events.detail: break off the skirmish and withdraw into the trees
ordered_events.quote: turn their horses and pull back into the trees

objects.detail: cleaned overnight, gleaming as they ride in
single shot fired nearby, splinters a birch, no one hit

ordered_events.detail: rides into the birch glade with four murids to meet Simon Vorontsov
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad rides in on a white-maned horse

objects.detail: catches light as the two men turn toward the fort road

counts.quote: four murids behind him in absolute formation
